features.name: signed addition via $signed cast on unsigned port
features.description: Code should include an addition of two $signed()-cast operands where the input port is declared as an unsigned bit-vector and the result is assigned to a wider signed output

features.name: sign extension via MSB concatenation
features.description: Code should include a manual sign-extension achieved by concatenating the MSB of a vector with the vector itself to produce a one-bit-wider value

features.name: multiply-by-two via left-shift bit concatenation
features.description: Code should include a left-shift-by-one optimization expressed as a bit concatenation that drops the LSB and appends a zero, equivalent to doubling a signed value
